name: ReputationScoreAggregator

neutralConcepts: Subscribe to ReviewPublished (add) AND ReviewRetracted (remove) — both call recalculate()
recalculate() fetches ALL PUBLISHED reviews (status=PUBLISHED filter) — not a running counter
Score range [1.0, 5.0] — clamp with Math.max(1.0, Math.min(5.0, rawScore)) before write
Recency weights from FREEDOM config: flow10_reputation_recency_weights
DNA-8: storeDocument to xiigen-reputation-scores BEFORE enqueue(reputation.updated)

ironRules.rule: Subscribe to BOTH ReviewPublished AND ReviewRetracted. Additive-only aggregation permanently inflates scores when reviews are retracted.
recalculate() MUST re-fetch all PUBLISHED reviews (status=PUBLISHED filter) — not use a running counter. Retracted reviews must not appear in the filtered set.
Score clamped to [1.0, 5.0] before storeDocument. Named check: reputation_score_clamped_1_to_5.
DNA-8: storeDocument to xiigen-reputation-scores BEFORE enqueue(reputation.updated).

keywords: retraction aggregation ReviewPublished ReviewRetracted recalculate PUBLISHED filter score clamp 1.0 5.0 weighted average
